title: Catch up absent learners with digital tools
staff_situations: How do I catch up absent learners?
underlying_needs: Capturing a lesson or explanation digitally so it can be accessed later
Sharing what was missed in a format a learner can work through independently
Checking understanding once a learner has caught up on their own

accessibility: Accessible summaries can be read with a screen reader or text-to-speech tool
Screen or audio explanations give a learner more than one way to catch up
inclusive_practice: Learners catch up independently without singling themselves out by asking what they missed
Reduces the gap between an absent and a present learner without extra staff time per learner

framework_alignment: Digital Skills Framework: digital capture and sharing tools
